title: They Are Still Being Shaken This Morning
titleEnglish: They Are Still Being Shaken This Morning
titleNative: 今朝も揺られてます
synopsis: Every morning at 6:58, commuters hurry onto the train at Sakuranomiya Station. For the past few months, a tentative romance has been brewing between two students from different schools. The young man is easily flustered, always stealing a glance at the young woman, but never making a move—much to the disappointment of the other passengers, who have been cheering them on in secret. Will this budding love story ever blossom? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)
searchTerms: They Are Still Being Shaken This Morning
synonyms: They Are Still Being Shaken This Morning.

title: Are You a Landmine, Chihara-san?
titleNative: 地雷なんですか？地原さん
synonyms: That Girl Is Cute... But Dangerous?
synopsis: It’s the start of a new semester, and high school junior Kuroki finds himself seated beside the girl everyone whispers about: Mai Chihara. With her gothic fashion, jet-black hair, and intense stare, Chihara is said to be a “landmine” girl or jirai-kei, the hyper-feminine, dark aesthetic often associated with yandere tendencies and unstable personalities. But when Kuroki accidentally draws Chihara’s attention, he discovers she isn’t nearly as unstable as people claim. Beneath the intimidating aura is a surprisingly sweet girl… if a little weird. Hesitantly, Kuroki begins to learn more about Chihara and her strange quirks. Is there more to her than her volatile reputation? Or is all the dark clothing just a red flag in disguise? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Me and the Prez, Drinking Under the Stars
titleEnglish: Me and the Prez, Drinking Under the Stars
titleNative: 社長と酒と星
synopsis: At 24, Reina Izutsu has recently become the new president of Izutsu Printing after taking over for her late father. Young and not quite experienced, Reina wants to do her best but unfortunately comes across as harsh with her employees. Stressed and feeling lost, Reina spends an evening drowning her sorrows in beer at an empty park. She rants and vents out loud to the starry sky that she wants to give up and quit being president, just letting off steam. Except, she fails to realize that her subordinate, 37-year-old section chief Kenichi Ishizumi, heard her drunken ramblings! But rather than use this against her, Kenichi finds himself charmed by the young woman. He vows then and there to support her and help her find her way as company president, no matter what! (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)
searchTerms: Me and the Prez, Drinking Under the Stars

title: Arelyn Is Sick and Tired
titleNative: 남주가 제 건강에 집착합니다
synonyms: Male Lead Is Obsessed With My Health
synopsis: The Caretakers' Council is a group of dedicated servants with only one goal: to nurse terminally ill Arelyn Halbern back to health. But Arelyn is already resigned to her fate, knowing she's simply an extra in a novel meant to die young. That is, until Crown Prince Pession Allermand takes an interest in her. Now, Pession visits Arelyn daily, nagging her to eat better, play, and be more active. With the novel's male lead lending his strength, can Arelyn finally find the will to fight her illness? (Source: Tapas)

title: Koppa Maichiru Sono Koro ni
titleNative: 木っ端舞い散る その頃に
synopsis: Kei Maebara gets a job!! The bizarre and eerie world of public service, depicted by Ryukishi07, from Higurashi When They Cry . In the 13th year of the Heisei era, in the Tokyo Metropolitan Area, Coastal Region... Due to the prolonged economic recession, the police force has weakened, and the growing number of disillusioned youth turning to semi-criminal lifestyles has led to a drastic decline in public safety... Amidst all this, Kei Maebara begins working at the district office. Can he become a respectable public servant? (Source: Akita Shoten, translated)

title: Koi to Senrigan to Aonisai
titleNative: 恋と千里眼と青二才
synopsis: Chihaya Senri is a high school girl who has the power of "senrigan", the ability to see the future. One day, she received a confession of love from a young boy named Eita. She refused, saying "I can't go out with a child..." But through her senrigan, she could see herself being with Eita in the future, after he has grown into an adult! She knows he'll be the man of her dreams. But if she started dating him now, she would be committing a crime! What will happen to the relationship between a wavering JK and an eager shota? (Source: Yan Manga, translated)

title: Second Time in Another World, This Old Man Is WAY Stronger Than the High School Heroes!
titleRomaji: Isekai Nidome no Ossan, Dou Kangaete mo Koukousei Yuusha yori Tsuyoi
titleEnglish: Second Time in Another World, This Old Man Is WAY Stronger Than the High School Heroes!
titleNative: 異世界二度目のおっさん、どう考えても高校生勇者より強い
synonyms: The Old Man in His Second Time in Another World Is Somehow Stronger than the High School Hero
synopsis: Riku Takayanagi is a boring 32-year-old businessman with nothing special about him. Or so it seems. In truth, he once saved another world as a hero. Now he’s back in Japan, living a normal life… until one day, he’s dragged into the mess with three high school students and summoned again—this time to a different world?! Suddenly thrust into the unknown, Riku steadies the panicked teen heroes, encourages them, and teaches them how to survive. The long-awaited opening to a second-chance another-world adventure—starring a caring, absurdly overpowered old man hero! (Source: Alpha Manga)

title: Shura Youjo no Eiyuutan: Hanpasha to Iwa Reta Youhei, Youjo ni Tensei Shite Nariagaru
titleRomaji: Shura Youjo no Eiyuutan: Hanpasha to Iwa Reta Youhei, Youjo ni Tensei Shite Nariagaru
titleNative: 修羅幼女の英雄譚　～半端者と言われた傭兵、幼女に転生して成り上がる～
synonyms: The Heroic Tale of Shura Young Girl: A Mercenary Who was Said to be Half-Baked is Reincarnated as a Young Girl and Rises to Success
synopsis: "If I had a second life, wouldn't I be a ‘hero’ again?" Solfort Enuma is an old soldier who has spent more than 60 years training to become a 'hero'. He was an ordinary man with no talent, but he never gave up and continued to pursue his dream. One day, Solfort faced the 'hero' he had always longed for, but his sword failed to strike a blow and he met an unrewarding end... It was supposed to happen, but Solfort found himself reincarnated as a young girl...! Now her (his) heroic tale begins, as she (he) changes her name to Sol, to once again pursue the dream that did not come true in her previous life!

tags.name: Female Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is female.

chapterSourceTitle: Shura Youjo no Eiyuutan ~Hanpa-sha to Iwa Reta Youhei, Youjo ni Tensei Shite Nariagaru~

title: Arte
titleNative: アルテ
synopsis: The story takes place in 16th century Florence during a time when women were relegated to the role of wives and caretakers, a young noble girl named Arte dreams of being an artist’s apprentice. One day she stumbles on the workshop of the eccentric Maestro Leo who decides to accept her as his student. Follow Arte on her journey as she discovers the joy and struggles on the path to becoming a maestro. (Source: Comikey) Note: Series resumed in June 2025 after the conclusion of the main story

title: Darwin no Taizai
titleNative: ダーウィンの大罪
synopsis: In a world shrouded in darkness, where demons run rampant, a young man named Hisago Harukawa, once forced into committing crimes under the threats of demons, sets his sights on his next target: a suspicious woman who calls herself Darwin, proponent of “Evolution.”! But this encounter changes everything, Hisago is pulled into a battle to send demons back to the depths of hell!! To survive, he must evolve. A devil-hunting fantasy of atonement begins!!!

title: They Were 11!
titleNative: 11人いる!
synopsis: They Were 11 is about ten Galactic University recruits who have passed many levels only to be given one final test. They are told to travel to an ancient spaceship and live there, together, for fifty-three days. This is not a problem until the ten recruits, hailing from diverse backgrounds and planets, discover that there are actually eleven of them on the ship. In fact, this problem turns out to be the test, as they have to trust each other in order to survive, even though one of them is an impostor. (Source: VIZ Media) Note: Won the 21st Shogakukan Manga Award for Shoujo in 1975.

synopsis: A very loose adaptation of the classic Super Famicom/SNES video game of the same name. Umihara Kawase must contend with a sinister organisation and confront the legacy of her oceanographer father with the help of her new friend Kouichi Shioji. Note: Serialised in Comic Burger in 1995, it ran for eight chapters. Only the first six were collected in tankobon format.

titleNative: 異世界召喚おじさんの銃無双ライフ ～サバゲー好きサラリーマンは会社終わりに異世界へ直帰する～
synonyms: Middle-Aged Man Overpowers with Guns in the Another Universe.
Isekai Shoukan Ojisan no Juu Musou Life: Survival Game-zuki Salaryman wa Kaisha Owari ni Isekai e Chokki Suru
synopsis: The middle-aged man and airsoft enthusiast Daisuke Koga is summoned to a different world on his 40th birthday. Given the ability to turn airsoft guns into real guns, Daisuke must save the other world while traveling back and forth between reality and the fantasy world. Alongside female swordsman Rena, Daisuke becomes the only gun user and dominates in the fantasy world after work! (Source: Houbunsha, translated)

title: If the Villainess and Villain Met and Fell in Love
titleRomaji: Akuyaku Reijou to Akuyaku Reisoku ga, Deatte Koi ni Ochita Nara: Nanashi no Seirei to Keiyakushite Oidasareta Reijou wa, Kyou mo Reisoku to Kisoiatteiru Youdesu
titleEnglish: If the Villainess and Villain Met and Fell in Love
titleNative: 悪役令嬢と悪役令息が、出逢って恋に落ちたなら　～名無しの精霊と契約して追い出された令嬢は、今日も令息と競い合っているようです～
synonyms: If the Villainess and Villain Met and Fell in Love
악역 영애와 악역 영식이 만나서 사랑에 빠지면
synopsis: Contracted with a no-name spirit, Brigitte Meidell is a disappointment to her noble family and the mockery of her peers at the Otoleanna Academy of Magic—except for one. Yuri Aurealis is intelligent, handsome…and oh so arrogant. He’s made enemies of the same people as Brigitte, meaning the two should get along just fine. However, his boorishness accidentally sparks a rivalry between them. It’s a competition that has the potential to bring the two closer than they ever thought…! (Source: Yen Press)

title: The Hero and the Sage, Reincarnated and Engaged
titleRomaji: Eiyuu to Kenja no Tensei Kon: Katsute no Koutekishu to Konyakushite Saikyou Fuufu ni Narimashita
titleEnglish: The Hero and the Sage, Reincarnated and Engaged
titleNative: 英雄と賢者の転生婚～かつての好敵手と婚約して最強夫婦になりました～
synonyms: The Reincarnated Marriage of a Hero and Sage
The Reincarnated Marriage of a Hero and Sage: After Becoming Engaged to a Former Rival, We Became the Strongest Couple
synopsis: With their nations in conflict, the Hero Reid and the Sage Elria had long been on opposing sides of the battlefield. However, it would all come to a much too sudden end with the Sage's passing. Single-handedly breaking through the enemy ranks to see Elria one last time, Reid meets his own heroic demise... But then, he opens his eyes as a newborn a thousand years later, getting another chance at life…and love?! (Source: Manga UP! Global)

tags.name: Reincarnation
tags.description: Features a character being born again after death, typically as another person or in another world.
